turns.query: Analyze the combined impact of industrial emissions and meteorological conditions on PM10 levels at Zhengding Street Thermal Station (station_id: 60) during 2025-06-08 08:00:00 to 2025-06-08 18:00:00.
turns.actual_response:
2025-06-08 08:00—18:00期间，正泰大街热力站共覆盖10个小时观测。该时段PM10均值为42.5，峰值为71.0，平均AQI为55.7；PM10峰值出现在08:00，距分析起点0小时。

总体变化表现为明显下降过程：08:00—12:00 PM10均值为55.75，12:00—15:00降至33.33，15:00—18:00维持在34.0左右。PM10与时间的相关系数为-0.806，说明该时段内浓度随时间下降特征较强。

工业排放方面，站点周边20公里内有13个工业排放源持续产生小时排放记录。该时段工业颗粒物排放总量为885.79 kg，小时排放量较稳定，均值约88.58 kg/h，波动较小。与PM10的同步相关性显示：总颗粒物排放与PM10相关系数为-0.197，距离加权颗粒物排放与PM10相关系数为-0.547，上风向45°范围内颗粒物排放与PM10相关系数为0.157。说明在该10小时窗口内，周边工业排放提供了持续的颗粒物负荷背景，但其小时变化并不能解释PM10峰值及下降过程；上风向工业排放影响信号存在但较弱。

气象条件对PM10变化的解释力更强。该时段平均风速为1.94 m/s，主导风向为东南风，平均湿度为28.4%，平均气温为29.49℃。PM10与风速相关系数为-0.768，与湿度相关系数为0.867，与气温相关系数为-0.813。结果表明，较低风速、较高湿度和较低气温条件更有利于PM10维持较高水平；随着风速和气温条件变化，PM10呈下降趋势。  

综合判断：该时段正泰大街热力站PM10水平主要受气象扩散条件调制，工业排放表现为持续背景贡献，而非短时峰值的主要驱动因素。08:00的PM10峰值发生时，上风向45°范围内工业颗粒物排放仅为3.80 kg，低于全时段上风向排放总量76.95 kg中的主要贡献时段，因此不支持将08:00峰值直接归因于邻近上风向工业排放突增。更合理的解释是：前期累积或区域背景颗粒物在较不利扩散条件下维持较高浓度，随后气象扩散条件改善，PM10快速下降。

监管建议：  
1. 对正泰大街热力站周边20公里工业源维持连续排放核查，重点关注颗粒物、氮氧化物、二氧化硫协同排放。  
2. 在低风速、高湿度条件下启动加密巡查和在线数据复核，因为该类气象条件与PM10升高关系更显著。  
3. 对东南风及相邻风向条件下的上风向工业源开展定向溯源，重点核查短时无组织排放和除尘设施运行稳定性。  
4. 后续应扩大到更长时间序列进行验证；本次分析仅基于10个小时数据，相关性结果适合作为短时过程诊断依据，不宜单独作为长期因果判定。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text
import numpy as np

start, end, sid = '2025-06-08 08:00:00', '2025-06-08 18:00:00', 60

# 基础核查：站点信息、窗口内站点小时数据数量
q0 = text("""
SELECT s.id, s.name, s.district_id, s.city_id,
       ST_X(s.coordinate::geometry) AS lon, ST_Y(s.coordinate::geometry) AS lat
FROM air_quality_station s
WHERE s.id=:sid
""")
station_info = pd.read_sql(q0, engine, params={"sid": sid})

q_count = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id=:sid AND timestamp>=:start AND timestamp<:end
""")
n_station = pd.read_sql(q_count, engine, params={"sid": sid, "start": start, "end": end}).iloc[0,0]

# 站点PM10/AQI统计与峰值；同时存储指定变量
q_stats = text("""
WITH w AS (
  SELECT timestamp, pm10, aqi
  FROM hourly_station_air_quality
  WHERE station_id=:sid AND timestamp>=:start AND timestamp<:end
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, AVG(pm10)::float AS mean_pm10, MAX(pm10)::float AS max_pm10,
       AVG(aqi)::float AS mean_aqi,
       EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((SELECT timestamp FROM w WHERE pm10=(SELECT MAX(pm10) FROM w) ORDER BY timestamp LIMIT 1) - CAST(:start AS timestamp)))/3600 AS peak_offset_h,
       MIN(pm10)::float AS min_pm10, STDDEV_SAMP(pm10)::float AS sd_pm10,
       CORR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (timestamp-CAST(:start AS timestamp)))/3600, pm10)::float AS pm10_time_corr
FROM w
""")
stats = pd.read_sql(q_stats, engine, params={"sid": sid, "start": start, "end": end}).iloc[0]
mean_pm10 = float(stats["mean_pm10"]) if pd.notna(stats["mean_pm10"]) else None
max_pm10 = float(stats["max_pm10"]) if pd.notna(stats["max_pm10"]) else None
mean_aqi = float(stats["mean_aqi"]) if pd.notna(stats["mean_aqi"]) else None
peak_pm10_offset_hours = int(stats["peak_offset_h"]) if pd.notna(stats["peak_offset_h"]) else None

# 逐小时站点数据（窗口仅10小时，用于相关分析，不打印原始记录）
q_hour = text("""
SELECT timestamp, pm10::float AS pm10, aqi::float AS aqi
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id=:sid AND timestamp>=:start AND timestamp<:end
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
station_hour = pd.read_sql(q_hour, engine, params={"sid": sid, "start": start, "end": end})

# 气象数据数量及逐小时数据（优先区县气象；窗口较小）
district_id = int(station_info.loc[0, "district_id"])
city_id = int(station_info.loc[0, "city_id"])
q_wc = text("""
SELECT
 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hourly_district_weather WHERE district_id=:did AND timestamp>=:start AND timestamp<:end) AS district_n,
 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hourly_city_weather WHERE city_id=:cid AND timestamp>=:start AND timestamp<:end) AS city_n
""")
weather_counts = pd.read_sql(q_wc, engine, params={"did": district_id, "cid": city_id, "start": start, "end": end}).iloc[0]

q_weather = text("""
WITH dw AS (
  SELECT timestamp, temperature::float AS temperature, humidity::float AS humidity,
         wind_speed::float AS wind_speed, wind_degree::float AS wind_degree, wind_direction
  FROM hourly_district_weather
  WHERE district_id=:did AND timestamp>=:start AND timestamp<:end
),
cw AS (
  SELECT timestamp, temperature::float AS temperature, humidity::float AS humidity,
         wind_speed::float AS wind_speed, wind_degree::float AS wind_degree, wind_direction
  FROM hourly_city_weather
  WHERE city_id=:cid AND timestamp>=:start AND timestamp<:end
)
SELECT COALESCE(dw.timestamp, cw.timestamp) AS timestamp,
       COALESCE(dw.temperature, cw.temperature) AS temperature,
       COALESCE(dw.humidity, cw.humidity) AS humidity,
       COALESCE(dw.wind_speed, cw.wind_speed) AS wind_speed,
       COALESCE(dw.wind_degree, cw.wind_degree) AS wind_degree,
       COALESCE(dw.wind_direction, cw.wind_direction) AS wind_direction
FROM cw FULL JOIN dw USING(timestamp)
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
weather_hour = pd.read_sql(q_weather, engine, params={"did": district_id, "cid": city_id, "start": start, "end": end})

# 周边工业源：先计数，再按小时聚合；20 km内，并识别与当小时来风方向一致的上风向源
q_comp_count = text("""
WITH st AS (SELECT coordinate FROM air_quality_station WHERE id=:sid)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS companies_20km, COUNT(e.id) AS emission_records
FROM st, polluting_company c
JOIN hourly_polluting_company_emission e ON e.company_id=c.id
WHERE ST_DWithin(c.coordinate, (SELECT coordinate FROM st), 20000)
  AND e.timestamp>=:start AND e.timestamp<:end
""")
comp_counts = pd.read_sql(q_comp_count, engine, params={"sid": sid, "start": start, "end": end}).iloc[0]

q_emis = text("""
WITH st AS (
  SELECT id, coordinate, district_id, city_id FROM air_quality_station WHERE id=:sid
),
w AS (
  SELECT timestamp, wind_degree
  FROM hourly_district_weather
  WHERE district_id=(SELECT district_id FROM st) AND timestamp>=:start AND timestamp<:end
  UNION ALL
  SELECT timestamp, wind_degree
  FROM hourly_city_weather
  WHERE city_id=(SELECT city_id FROM st) AND timestamp>=:start AND timestamp<:end
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM hourly_district_weather
      WHERE district_id=(SELECT district_id FROM st) AND timestamp=hourly_city_weather.timestamp
    )
),
ce AS (
  SELECT e.timestamp, c.id AS company_id,
         e.pm::float AS pm, e.nox::float AS nox, e.so2::float AS so2,
         e.co::float AS co, e.exhaust_gas::float AS exhaust_gas,
         ST_Distance(c.coordinate, st.coordinate)::float AS dist_m,
         degrees(ST_Azimuth(st.coordinate::geometry, c.coordinate::geometry))::float AS bearing_from_station,
         w.wind_degree::float AS wind_degree
  FROM st
  JOIN polluting_company c ON ST_DWithin(c.coordinate, st.coordinate, 20000)
  JOIN hourly_polluting_company_emission e ON e.company_id=c.id
  LEFT JOIN w ON w.timestamp=e.timestamp
  WHERE e.timestamp>=:start AND e.timestamp<:end
),
x AS (
  SELECT *,
         LEAST(ABS(bearing_from_station-wind_degree), 360-ABS(bearing_from_station-wind_degree)) AS angle_diff
  FROM ce
)
SELECT timestamp,
       COUNT(DISTINCT company_id) AS emitting_companies,
       SUM(pm)::float AS pm_sum,
       SUM(nox)::float AS nox_sum,
       SUM(so2)::float AS so2_sum,
       SUM(co)::float AS co_sum,
       SUM(exhaust_gas)::float AS exhaust_gas_sum,
       SUM(pm/GREATEST(dist_m/1000.0,0.1))::float AS distance_weighted_pm,
       SUM(CASE WHEN angle_diff<=45 THEN pm ELSE 0 END)::float AS upwind_pm_45deg,
       SUM(CASE WHEN angle_diff<=45 THEN nox ELSE 0 END)::float AS upwind_nox_45deg,
       SUM(CASE WHEN angle_diff<=45 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int AS upwind_records_45deg,
       AVG(CASE WHEN angle_diff<=45 THEN dist_m END)::float AS mean_upwind_dist_m
FROM x
GROUP BY timestamp
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
emis_hour = pd.read_sql(q_emis, engine, params={"sid": sid, "start": start, "end": end})

# 合并并计算诊断统计
df = station_hour.merge(weather_hour, on="timestamp", how="left").merge(emis_hour, on="timestamp", how="left")
for col in ["emitting_companies","pm_sum","nox_sum","so2_sum","co_sum","exhaust_gas_sum","distance_weighted_pm","upwind_pm_45deg","upwind_nox_45deg","upwind_records_45deg"]:
    if col in df:
        df[col] = df[col].fillna(0)

corr_cols = ["pm_sum","distance_weighted_pm","upwind_pm_45deg","nox_sum","so2_sum","exhaust_gas_sum","wind_speed","humidity","temperature"]
corr = {c: (float(df[["pm10", c]].corr().iloc[0,1]) if c in df and df[c].notna().sum()>=2 and df["pm10"].notna().sum()>=2 and df[c].std(skipna=True)>0 else None) for c in corr_cols}

peak_ts = df.loc[df["pm10"].idxmax(), "timestamp"] if len(df) and df["pm10"].notna().any() else None
pre_peak = df[df["timestamp"] <= peak_ts] if peak_ts is not None else df.iloc[0:0]
summary = {
    "station": station_info.loc[0, "name"],
    "station_rows": int(n_station),
    "mean_pm10": mean_pm10,
    "max_pm10": max_pm10,
    "mean_aqi": mean_aqi,
    "peak_pm10_offset_hours": peak_pm10_offset_hours,
    "min_pm10": float(stats["min_pm10"]) if pd.notna(stats["min_pm10"]) else None,
    "sd_pm10": float(stats["sd_pm10"]) if pd.notna(stats["sd_pm10"]) else None,
    "pm10_time_corr": float(stats["pm10_time_corr"]) if pd.notna(stats["pm10_time_corr"]) else None,
    "weather_rows_district": int(weather_counts["district_n"]),
    "weather_rows_city": int(weather_counts["city_n"]),
    "companies_20km": int(comp_counts["companies_20km"]),
    "emission_records_20km": int(comp_counts["emission_records"]),
    "avg_wind_speed": float(df["wind_speed"].mean()) if "wind_speed" in df else None,
    "avg_humidity": float(df["humidity"].mean()) if "humidity" in df else None,
    "dominant_wind_direction": df["wind_direction"].mode().iloc[0] if "wind_direction" in df and df["wind_direction"].notna().any() else None,
    "total_pm_emission_20km": float(df["pm_sum"].sum()) if "pm_sum" in df else None,
    "total_upwind_pm_45deg": float(df["upwind_pm_45deg"].sum()) if "upwind_pm_45deg" in df else None,
    "pre_peak_total_pm": float(pre_peak["pm_sum"].sum()) if "pm_sum" in pre_peak else None,
    "pre_peak_upwind_pm": float(pre_peak["upwind_pm_45deg"].sum()) if "upwind_pm_45deg" in pre_peak else None
}
print("基础统计与已存储变量：", summary)
print("相关系数诊断：", corr)
print("PM10分段均值：", {
    "08-12": float(df[(df.timestamp>=pd.Timestamp(start)) & (df.timestamp<pd.Timestamp('2025-06-08 12:00:00'))]["pm10"].mean()),
    "12-15": float(df[(df.timestamp>=pd.Timestamp('2025-06-08 12:00:00')) & (df.timestamp<pd.Timestamp('2025-06-08 15:00:00'))]["pm10"].mean()),
    "15-18": float(df[(df.timestamp>=pd.Timestamp('2025-06-08 15:00:00')) & (df.timestamp<pd.Timestamp(end))]["pm10"].mean())
})
print("气象分布摘要：", df[["wind_speed","humidity","temperature","wind_degree"]].describe().round(3).to_dict())
print("排放分布摘要：", df[["pm_sum","distance_weighted_pm","upwind_pm_45deg","nox_sum","so2_sum","exhaust_gas_sum","emitting_companies"]].describe().round(3).to_dict())
